description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and a long, pointed tail. Its plumage is predominantly dark gray to black, with subtle hints of red or maroon visible on the wings and around the head and tail. The beak is short, slightly curved, and appears robust, suitable for a variety of feeding habits. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the legs are not prominently visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body. The surface texture appears matte with a slight sheen, mimicking the natural feather structure. The overall form is sleek and aerodynamic, typical of birds adapted for agile flight.
description: A sleek, dark gray to black bird with subtle red highlights, a pointed tail, and a slightly curved beak. The body is streamlined and the surface mimics natural feathers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, pointed tail, and subtle red highlights on the head and wing area.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the rounded head, short beak, and the symmetry of the folded wings along the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same streamlined profile, with red highlights more visible on the lower wing and head.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the long, pointed tail and the narrow tapering of the body towards the tail tip.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark with subtle red highlights on wings and tail
